docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
This is the entry page to the Insight Control Panel Documentation.

Below you find links to the currently supported releases, as well as the next development version.

docs.title: Releases
docs.text:
We provide documentation for these supported versions:

  • Version 36.x LTS
  • Version 34.x LTS

docs.title: End of Life
docs.text: • Version 33.x and older, except for LTS releases

docs.title: Development
docs.text: Access to the documentation of the next upcoming release is available here.
